articles.title: Lombard Hospital conferred Best Green Energy Efficiency Practices award
articles.description: Lombard Hospital in Udupi wins HELP Sustainability Excellence Award 2026 for outstanding green energy efficiency practices in healthcare.

articles.title: 99% Of Business Executives Believe AI Will Lead To Job Cuts In Next Two Years
articles.description: The report reveals a sharp rise in companies planning to cut junior roles, with employee concerns about AI-related job loss expected to escalate significantly by 2026.

articles.title: Did heavy rains add to Kerala lottery's revenue challenges? Key CAG findings explained
articles.description: CAG audit finds Kerala lottery net yield fell by ₹140.51 crore in 2024-25 despite record sales, citing rising costs, heavy rains and audit lapses.

articles.title: Commercial REITs in India to add 40-45 MSF area by FY26: Report
articles.description: Indian commercial office REITs are set to expand leasable area by 25-30% to 190-195 MSF by the end of next fiscal, driven by asset additions. Crisil Ratings notes credit profiles will remain healthy on steady rental growth and high occupancy.

articles.title: Farmers pitch closed Government of India Press campus at Veerapandi in Coimbatore as site for AIIMS
articles.description: Farmers propose the vacant Government of India Press campus in Coimbatore for the new AIIMS, preserving agricultural land.

articles.title: Wall Street today: US stocks slide as IT sell-off deepens, Nasdaq trims over 2%, Dow Jones falls 750 points
articles.description: Global markets experienced a significant downturn Tuesday, with Wall Street indices plunging amid a deepening tech stock sell-off. Concerns over heavy AI spending and anticipated US interest rate hikes are fueling investor anxiety. Major tech giants and chipmakers saw substantial drops, mirroring weakness seen across Asian and European exchanges. Oil prices remained subdued following a US decision on Iranian oil sanctions.

articles.title: iTokri's 95% women team: building India's largest handmade platform from Gwalior
DK khazi Twaqa Ahmad Musliyar passes away
articles.description: Dakshina Kannada Khazi Alhaj Twaqa Ahmad Musliyar dies at 78 in Mangaluru; served since 2010, led 200+ Jama-Aths; burial near Moodubidire.

articles.title: Recykal raises $23 million from Biological E, AIG Hospitals promoters & existing investors
articles.description: Recykal raises $23M bridge round led by Biological E, AIG Hospitals promoters and existing investors to scale DRS, tech platform, and global expansion.

articles.title: Global footwear firms boost Tamil Nadu sourcing; Adidas unit starts in July
articles.description: Phoenix Kothari plans to begin Adidas production at its Karur facility from July as Tamil Nadu strengthens its position as a hub for global footwear manufacturing

articles.title: Indices trade with significant losses; IT share decline
articles.description: At 14:28 IST, the barometer index, the S&P BSE Sensex, tanked 547.64 points or 0.71% to 76,546.43. The Nifty 50 index fell 187.80 points or 0.79% to 23,912.90.

articles.title: Gap turns to AI to modernise marketing across brand portfolio
articles.description: Google Cloud will underpin a unified data foundation combining customer and product intelligence.

articles.title: E-Comms Hiding Health Info: No Manufacturing, No Expiry Dates On Display; Consumers Grope In The Dark
articles.description: Your groceries arrive in minutes—but do you know when they expire? Times Now Digital launches a campaign holding Zepto, Blinkit and Amazon accountable for hiding crucial product dates.

articles.title: Missed your credit card payment by a day? Here's what really happens
articles.description: One late payment is unlikely to ruin your credit score, but it could still cost you money. Here's what happens when you miss a credit card due date.

articles.title: We Win gains after securing Rs 9 crore MPRDC contract
articles.description: We Win rose 2% to Rs 51 after the company announced that it has received a work order worth Rs 8.69 crore from the Madhya Pradesh Road Development Corporation (MPRDC).

articles.title: Volumes spurt at Cohance Lifesciences Ltd counter
articles.description: Cohance Lifesciences Ltd registered volume of 234.51 lakh shares by 14:14 IST on NSE, a 41.19 fold spurt over two-week average daily volume of 5.69 lakh shares

articles.title: 'Take it to Calcutta HC': Supreme Court on plea claiming lakhs may lose ration benefits after West Bengal SIR exclusion
articles.description: The controversy has been building since May with a report saying that newly formed BJP governments in West Bengal and Bihar had begun using SIR-linked data to identify beneficiaries who may no longer qualify for welfare benefits.

articles.title: Moneycontrol Pro Panorama | Indian pharma’s indispensable place in the world
articles.description: In this edition of Moneycontrol Pro Panorama: Gold and silver still offer diversification benefits, scale and flexibility help firms weather volatility, applications will drive AI’s long-term economic value, and more

articles.description: Global tech rout deepens as Kospi tanks 10 percent, Samsung and SK Hynix slump, Nikkei 225 falls, Nasdaq drops, and US S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 futures signal weak start

articles.title: Turtlemint Fintech IPO fully subscribed on Day 3, booked 1.08 times so far - Check GMP
articles.description: Turtlemint Fintech IPO allotment is expected on June 24, while share listing is proposed on June 29.

articles.title: India’s private sector hits three-month low amid softer demand and cautious hiring
articles.description: India’s private sector growth slowed to a three-month low in June as demand softened, hiring weakened and business confidence fell, although easing inflation pressures offered some relief

articles.title: Can me and my wife claim LTCG tax exemption on gains from residential property sold in 2025?
articles.description: ET Wealth Reader's Query: In 2025, I sold a residential property, which was purchased in 2008 in the joint names of my wife and I. However, my wife did not contribute financially to the purchase. I would like to know if both of us can claim long-term capital gains tax benefits.

articles.title: Planning to buy Honda Elevate? Facelift may bring features from new City
articles.description: On the outside, expect new front and rear bumpers, revised headlamps and tail lamps with updated lighting signatures, and possibly a fresh set of alloy wheels.

articles.title: Strait of Hormuz slowly reopens, but global shipping remains far from normal
articles.description: Commercial shipping through the Strait of Hormuz is recovering following Iran-US talks. Stay updated on energy corridor stability and regional security developments.

articles.title: Woman Sells Shares For Rs 26 Crore Profit, Builds Bungalow But Still Pays Zero Tax. Here's How
articles.description: ITAT upholds exemption on Rs 26 crore capital gains from share sale for residential construction.

articles.title: More sports, less spending: Inside the Ahmedabad 2030 Commonwealth Games plan
articles.description: Commonwealth Games 2030 Ahmedabad to include 17 sports with a new hosting model reducing costs by 60 per cent.

articles.title: ORCL Stock At Nearly 2-Month Low: 'Big Red' Reportedly Trimmed Workforce By 13% In FY26 On AI Efficiency
articles.description: Oracle’s full-time employee strength was 141,000 as of May 31, compared to 162,000 a year ago.

articles.title: Info Edge gains 4% as investors cheer letter to shareholders; buy or wait?
articles.description: Info Edge said it has invested about ₹4,900 crore across 135 startups since 2020, with an overall portfolio valuation of about ₹41,300 crore, implying an 8.4x multiple and 33 per cent gross IRR

articles.title: Vedanta, Nalco, Hindalco, Hind Zinc, Tata Steel shares down up to 9% today; here's why
articles.description: Nalco Ltd declined 4.40 per cent to Rs 361.50 at 10.40 am. Hindalco fell 2.72 per cent to Rs 986.85. Hindustan Zinc shed 2.81 per cent to Rs 555.35.

articles.title: Kirloskar Oil Engines shares up 36% in 2 days. Should you buy or sell?
articles.description: Kirloskar Oil Engines shares surged nearly 36% in two sessions after securing a 192 MW data centre order from HyperNext. Brokerages remain bullish, citing capex-led growth and strong demand from AI and cloud infrastructure, although current market price has already surpassed most target valuations.

articles.title: New terminal file heads to Railway Board; Proposal to name it 'Ernakulam Central'
articles.description: Southern Railway fast-tracks the DPR for Kochi's new Ernakulam Central terminal at the Marshalling Yard. Read details on the ₹267-crore project, Ernakulam South upgrades and Vande Bharat coach updates.

articles.title: RBI’s message to banks: Treat MSMEs as business partners, not regulatory burden
articles.description: RBI Governor Sanjay Malhotra said banks must treat MSMEs as long-term business partners, not just a regulatory obligation, as formal credit to the sector continues to rise.

articles.title: NFO Alert: JM Financial Mutual Fund launches multi asset allocation fund
articles.description: JM Financial Mutual Fund has launched its new JM Multi Asset Allocation Fund, an open-ended scheme designed for long-term wealth creation. Subscriptions open June 24 and close July 8, 2026. This fund offers a diversified portfolio across equity, debt, gold/silver, and commodity derivatives, aiming for growth with a structured, actively managed approach to navigate various market cycles and economic conditions.

articles.title: Advit Jewels IPO opens today. Check brokerages review, GMP, subscription and other details
articles.description: The SME IPO is being offered at a fixed price of Rs 138 per share and will remain open for subscription from June 23 to June 25. The shares are proposed to be listed on the BSE SME platform on July 1.

articles.title: Business wisdom of the day: 'If you do not enter the tiger’s cave...'
articles.description: In today’s fast-paced corporate landscape, the "tiger's cave" isn't a physical place — it is modern market uncertainty, disruptive tech, and unmapped consumer territory.

articles.description: Brent crude futures rose 24 cents, or 0.38%, to $78.15 a barrel, while U.S. West Texas Intermediate gained 33 cents, or 0.46%, to $74.19 a barrel as of 0026 GMT.

articles.title: Stock Market LIVE: GIFT Nifty signals tepid open; Asia markets decline; Brent crude above $78
articles.description: Sensex Today | Stock Market LIVE Updates, June 23: The GIFT Nifty indicated a tepid open for the Nifty50 index. Most Asian markets declined, tracking overnight losses on Wall Street

articles.title: UK continues to count its economic losses, and Prime Ministers | Number Theory
articles.description: Keir Starmer is the sixth consecutive prime minister in the UK to step down without completing a full-term in the last 10 years.

articles.title: PMC initiates road planning exercise in cantt ahead of proposed merger
articles.description: On Monday, PMC floated a tender to appoint a consultant to prepare detailed project reports (DPRs) and supervise road development works across the Pune Cantonment Assembly constituency

articles.title: Final deck slab cast, Barapullah Phase-III corridor nears completion
articles.description: The Barapullah Phase-III corridor in Delhi nears completion after nearly nine years, with the final slab cast; expected to open by mid-July.

articles.title: S&P 500, Nasdaq Drop As SpaceX, Broader Tech Weakness Outweighs US-Iran Hopes — SPCX, GOOGL, NFLX, COIN, MU In Focus
articles.description: SpaceX shares tanked 16% to their lowest level since listing, marking its third straight daily decline.

articles.title: Vedanta shares fall 6% after Rs 2,149-crore block deal; promoter Twin Star likely seller
articles.description: Vedanta's stock experienced a significant dip, dropping up to 6% from its intraday peak of Rs 287. This decline followed media speculation that promoter entity Twin Star Holdings likely reduced its stake via a substantial block deal. Around 7.3 crore shares, valued at Rs 2,149 crore, were reportedly traded at Rs 292 each. Further details are anticipated.

articles.title: Best gilt mutual funds to invest in June 2026
articles.description: Gilt funds are being recommended by advisors for 'aggressive' debt investors anticipating interest rate cuts by the RBI, with potential for double-digit returns. These funds, investing in government securities, carry no credit risk but are highly sensitive to interest rate fluctuations. Investors should have a long-term horizon and understand rate cycles to benefit from potential gains when rates fall.

articles.title: South Korean shares fall more than 4% on profit-taking
articles.description: South Korean stocks experienced a sharp decline of over 4% on Tuesday, with the KOSPI index plummeting as investors cashed in on recent gains in chipmaker shares. Major players like Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix saw significant drops. This profit-taking, particularly by foreign investors, led to a trading curb being briefly triggered. The won also saw a slight appreciation against the dollar.

articles.title: Industry leaders hail West Bengal Budget’s push on infrastructure, land reform and health
articles.description: West Bengal industry leaders commend the new BJP government's budget for its focus on infrastructure, land reform, and healthcare development.

articles.title: What luxury travellers really want now, according to hospitality’s biggest names
articles.description: As traveller expectations evolve, hospitality leaders are rethinking what luxury travel should look and feel like.

articles.title: HC dismisses discoms’ plea; paves way for audit by CAG
articles.description: Delhi HC dismissed petitions by BSES discoms challenging an audit by CAG, stating they were premature and did not contain adverse findings.

articles.title: Why India’s wealthy families are betting on startups as venture capitalists pull back
articles.description: From real estate to technology, India’s affluent families are channelling more of their fortunes into startups through family offices as founders increasingly seek investors with a longer-term outlook.
